system.flavor: With a word and a quickly drawn talisman, you stomp your foot and forbid your foe from stepping on holy earth.
system.effect: Mark a foe in range. While marked, your chosen foe treats all spaces inside your auras or zones as dangerous terrain. While inside those zones, you and allies gain attack [+] against your target. A foe can save at the end of their turn to end this mark, but only if they are not in one of your zones or auras.
